ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "manufacturer" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "cost_in_credits" REAL /* Cost of the vehicle in credits */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the vehicle in meters */,
  "max_atmosphering_speed" REAL /* Maximum atmosphering speed of the vehicle in km/h */,
  "crew" INTEGER /* Number of crew members required to operate the vehicle */,
  "passengers" INTEGER /* Number of passengers the vehicle can carry */,
  "cargo_capacity" INTEGER /* Cargo capacity of the vehicle in kg */,
  "consumables" TEXT /* Consumables required by the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_class" INTEGER /* Class of the vehicle (e.g., wheeled, repulsorcraft, starfighter) */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of the vehicle (e.g., land, air, space) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the vehicle */,
  "production_year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was produced */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Unique registration number of the vehicle */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the last service */,
  "next_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled service */,
  "service_interval" INTEGER /* Interval at which the vehicle should be serviced (e.g., every 10,000 km) */,
  "service_mileage" INTEGER /* Current mileage of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_manufacturer FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_vehicle_class FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_class") REFERENCES vehicle_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "max_cargo_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum cargo capacity for the class in kg */,
  "max_speed" REAL /* Maximum speed for the class in km/h */,
  "average_fuel_efficiency" REAL /* Average fuel efficiency for the class in km/l */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance schedule */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "service_interval" INTEGER /* Interval at which the maintenance is scheduled */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Next scheduled maintenance date */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., scheduled, completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_schedules_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "mechanic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mechanic who performed the maintenance */,
  "parts_used" TEXT /* List of parts used during the maintenance */,
  "labor_hours" INTEGER /* Number of labor hours spent on the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_mechanic_id FOREIGN KEY ("mechanic_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle in inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the vehicle in inventory */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the vehicle is stored */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the vehicle (e.g., available, out of service, deployed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., logistics manager, mechanic) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the vehicle */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system (e.g., PC, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being assigned */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being assigned the vehicle */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle was assigned */,
  "assignment_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the assignment */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_assignments_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being described */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Current condition of the vehicle (e.g., operational, under maintenance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle's condition */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who performed the inspection */,
  "inspection_result" TEXT /* Result of the inspection (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_conditions_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_conditions_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_maintenance_costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance cost entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "cost" REAL /* Total cost of the maintenance */,
  "parts_cost" REAL /* Cost of parts used during the maintenance */,
  "labor_cost" REAL /* Cost of labor for the maintenance */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_maintenance_costs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
